title: Fix plot_sampling_frame TR-only compatibility
description: plot_sampling_frame currently dereferences sframe.TR before checking attribute existence, which can raise on sampling frames that expose only tr. Add safe fallback and regression test.
close_reason: Already implemented and validated: plot_sampling_frame handles tr-only sampling frames and regression test passes

title: Fix public type hints without custom globalns
description: typing.get_type_hints fails on EventVariable.bin_values, EventMatrix.split_columns, EventBasis.to_matrix, and parse_formula unless tests inject shared globalns. Import/qualify referenced symbols so default resolution works and update regression tests to call get_type_hints directly.
close_reason: Public API type hints now exercised without shared globalns in dedicated test; annotations for bin_values/split_columns/to_matrix/parse_formula resolve directly via built-in globals.

title: Fix fmrimod.dispatch event generic handlers for concrete event classes
description: dispatch generics registered on EventProtocol do not dispatch for EventFactor/EventVariable/EventMatrix in practice, causing NotImplementedError for onsets/durations/elements/cells/conditions. Register concrete base event handler(s) and add regression tests for categorical and matrix events.
close_reason: Registered concrete BaseEvent handlers for dispatch event generics and added regression tests

title: Make plot_sampling_frame honor show_ticks and tick_every
description: plot_sampling_frame accepts show_ticks and tick_every but currently ignores both. Add regression tests that assert ticks are hidden when show_ticks=False and spacing honors tick_every, then implement behavior.
close_reason: Implemented tick controls in plot_sampling_frame with passing regression tests and full suite

title: Capture expected contrast warnings in tests
description: Current suite has 9 warning-summary entries from contrast tests that intentionally exercise warning paths. Update tests to assert warnings with pytest.warns so behavior is explicit and warning output stays clean.
close_reason: Completed: captured expected contrast warning paths with pytest.warns and validated full suite

title: Make HRF decorator tests NumPy trapezoid-compatible
description: tests/hrf/test_hrf_decorators.py uses np.trapezoid, which fails in older NumPy environments (AttributeError). Add compatibility helper and regression coverage so tests pass across supported NumPy versions.
close_reason: Added NumPy-version-compatible trapezoid helper and regression coverage in HRF decorator tests

title: Fix split_by_block EventMatrix reconstruction keyword mismatch
description: constructs EventMatrix with  but EventMatrix.__init__ expects . Add regression test splitting EventMatrix by block labels and preserve column names; patch utility to pass correct keyword.
close_reason: Fixed EventMatrix split_by_block constructor keyword and added regression test

title: Replace scipy.misc.derivative with local finite-difference implementation
description: Current import in fmrimod/hrf/derivatives.py emits deprecation warnings and will break in SciPy 2.0. Add regression tests and remove scipy.misc dependency.
close_reason: Added regression coverage for local finite-difference derivative behavior and scipy.misc compatibility; no scipy.misc dependency remains in usage path.

title: Isolate import-order robustness test to prevent module identity poisoning
description: test_module_import_order_robustness clears fmrimod modules in-process, causing stale class references and widespread isinstance/singledispatch failures later in suite. Move the probe to a fresh subprocess and keep parent interpreter untouched.
close_reason: Import-order robustness test already runs import probe in a fresh subprocess; parent interpreter state is no longer mutated and no contamination observed.

title: Respect explicit sampling_frame length in fallback convolution
description: Fallback convolve paths (array/callable HRF) derive output length from grid[-1] and sampling_rate, so explicit grids like [0,2,4] or [10,11,12] return wrong lengths. Implement fallback interpolation onto provided sampling_frame and add regression tests across dispatch paths.
close_reason: Fixed fallback convolution to interpolate onto explicit sampling_frame; added regression tests for non-unit and shifted grids

title: Break circular import between utils.misc and regressor
description: Shuffled test-module order reveals circular import during collection: fmrimod.utils.misc imports Regressor from fmrimod.regressor while regressor imports utils.misc via convolution/cache. Fix by removing runtime import cycle (TYPE_CHECKING/lazy import) and add regression test for import-order robustness.
close_reason: Fixed import-order guard and added import-cycle regression tests; import-order tests now pass in shuffled subprocess.

title: Stabilize tests against joblib core-count warning
description: test_lowrank emits joblib/loky warning about unavailable physical core count on some environments. Add deterministic test-time setting (LOKY_MAX_CPU_COUNT) to suppress environment-specific warning.
close_reason: Completed: set LOKY_MAX_CPU_COUNT=1 in test fixture to suppress environment-specific loky warning

title: Fix remaining TR-only compatibility in visualization code
description: At least one visualization path still dereferences sframe.TR before checking attribute existence (design_map.py). Add regression test with tr-only sampling frame and patch to support both TR and tr safely.
close_reason: No action needed: TR-only visualization path already fixed and covered

title: Remove scipy.misc.derivative dependency in HRF derivatives
description: fmrimod/hrf/derivatives.py imports scipy.misc.derivative, which emits deprecation warnings and will be removed in SciPy 2.0. Replace with internal finite-difference implementation and add regression test to ensure module import emits no scipy.misc deprecation warning.
close_reason: Completed: removed scipy.misc.derivative dependency and added import-warning regression test

title: SamplingFrame should accept legacy TR keyword
description: Parity tests fail because SamplingFrame.__init__ rejects legacy TR= keyword. Add regression test and implement alias handling (TR -> tr) with clear validation when both are provided.
close_reason: Completed

title: Add explicit exception chaining for parser and dispatch errors
description: Ruff B904 flags exception handlers that re-raise without , obscuring root causes. Patch high-traffic paths and add regression tests that assert __cause__ is preserved.
close_reason: B904 exception-chaining class now clean

title: Audit suite under warnings-as-errors
description: Run pytest with warnings promoted to errors to uncover latent behavior issues currently hidden by warning handling. Add targeted tests/fixes for real defects discovered.
close_reason: Completed: suite passes with warnings promoted to errors

title: Fix SamplingFrame tr/TR ndarray conflict check
description: SamplingFrame currently compares  directly; when tr is ndarray this raises ambiguous truth-value ValueError. Replace with array-safe equality check and add regression tests for matching/mismatching ndarray aliases.
close_reason: Already fixed and covered by ndarray tr/TR alias tests

title: Audit isolated test module collection for hidden import-order bugs
description: Run per-file pytest collection in fresh processes to catch circular imports and module-init side effects masked by full-suite run order. Add regression tests/fixes for any failures found.
close_reason: Completed: per-file isolated pytest collection audit across 87 modules found no import-order collection failures

title: Fix dispatch.design_matrix for EventModel and property-based models
description: dispatch.design_matrix currently only matches DesignMatrixProtocol method-style objects and misses EventModel (property-based). Calling dispatch.design_matrix(event_model(...)) raises NotImplementedError. Add registration/compat logic for ModelProtocol and property/callable access; add regression tests.
close_reason: Added ModelProtocol design_matrix dispatch support for property/callable forms with regression test

title: Fix plot_sampling_frame tr/scalar handling in isolated runs
description: Isolated execution of tests/design/test_visualization_comprehensive.py fails: grid style can reference undefined tr, and timeline widths do not honor per-block TR values. Ensure plot_sampling_frame computes scalar TR safely and per-block durations correctly.
close_reason: Fixed by latest plot_sampling_frame updates; isolated visualization module run now passes

title: Register rpy2 pytest marker to remove unknown-mark warnings
description: Full suite currently passes but emits PytestUnknownMarkWarning for @pytest.mark.rpy2. Add regression test for marker registration and update pytest.ini markers.
close_reason: Completed: added marker regression test and registered rpy2 marker in pytest.ini

title: Replace deprecated np.trapz in HRF decorator tests
description: pytest run still emits DeprecationWarning from tests/hrf/test_hrf_decorators.py using np.trapz. Switch to np.trapezoid in tests to keep CI warning-clean on newer NumPy.
close_reason: Completed: replaced np.trapz with np.trapezoid and validated test suite

title: Add ndarray/DataFrame support to dispatch.design_matrix
description: dispatch.design_matrix currently raises NotImplementedError for ndarray and pandas DataFrame inputs. Register explicit handlers so raw design matrices can flow through the generic API.

title: Handle existing HRF objects in make_hrf
description: `make_hrf` currently assumes non-string input is dict and calls `.get`, causing AttributeError for `FunctionHRF` objects passed from trial-varying flows. Add explicit HRF pass-through using `gen_hrf`.
close_reason: Handled HRF instances/array protocols in make_hrf and cached_hrf_eval to support protocol HRF objects without params.

title: Harden SamplingFrame tr/TR conflict and keep TR alias regression coverage
description: Close gap in SamplingFrame constructor around legacy TR alias by asserting conflict behavior and adding explicit sampling-frame tests for TR= usage plus mismatch rejection.
close_reason: Implemented and validated SamplingFrame TR alias test + conflicting tr/TR TypeError validation.

title: Remove mutable default in test helper make_term
description: tests/design/test_contrast_weights_coverage.py uses a list default argument in make_term(levels=[...]), which is a latent state-sharing bug. Replace with None default and explicit initialization.
close_reason: Removed mutable default argument in make_term; validated with targeted and full test suite

title: Fix plot_sampling_frame for per-block TR arrays
description: Timeline visualization currently uses only first TR for all runs, producing wrong durations when SamplingFrame has run-varying TR values. Add regression test and use per-block TR in duration calculations and labels.
close_reason: Fixed per-block TR handling in plot_sampling_frame timeline/grid with regression tests

title: Fix SamplingFrame TR keyword compatibility
description: pytest currently fails in rpy2 parity tests because SamplingFrame no longer accepts uppercase TR keyword. Add compatibility test for TR alias and implement constructor support while preserving tr behavior.
close_reason: Validated TR/tr compatibility via targeted + full pytest run

title: Reject unsupported soft_subspace lam string
description: currently coerces soft_subspace.lam='auto'/'gcv' to 1.0 silently; this hides unsupported mode and can mask configuration errors. Add explicit error path and regression tests.
close_reason: fit_run_ols now rejects unsupported soft_subspace lam strings with explicit NotImplementedError; added regression test in test_glm/test_strategies.py

title: Audit suite under xdist parallel execution
description: Run tests with pytest-xdist to uncover shared-state and order/race issues not seen in serial runs. Add fixes/regression tests for any failures.
close_reason: Blocked in current environment: pytest-xdist plugin not installed (-n unsupported)

title: Audit per-file test execution for hidden order bugs
description: Run test modules individually in fresh pytest runs (execution, not collect) to catch order-dependent failures masked by suite context. Add regression tests and fixes for any failures.
close_reason: Completed: per-file execution audit across all test modules found no deterministic isolated failures

title: Fix missing ast import in contrast_weights expression evaluation
description: ruff F821 reports undefined name ast in fmrimod/contrast/contrast_weights.py. Add missing import and regression test that exercises expression-path using ast parsing.
close_reason: Not a runtime defect: ast findings were annotation-scope lint noise

title: Run ruff bug scan and fix high-signal defects
description: Use ruff static analysis to catch undefined names, bad imports, and likely runtime defects not currently covered by tests. Add regression tests for fixed defects.
close_reason: Completed high-signal ruff bug scan: resolved F821 defects with regression coverage

title: Fix dispatch.columns for models exposing column_names as property
description: dispatch.columns currently calls obj.column_names(), but EventModel exposes column_names as a property list. This raises TypeError. Add regression test and support both callable and property forms.
close_reason: Added dispatch.columns fallback for arbitrary objects with column_names and regression tests for property/callable/missing attr

title: Fix regressor type hints failing get_type_hints due to scipy reference
description: typing.get_type_hints fails for Regressor.evaluate, RegressorSet.evaluate, and regressor_design because annotations reference scipy.sparse without scipy in module globals. Add proper sparse imports and regression tests.
close_reason: Updated regressor/core and regressor/design annotations to use module-level scipy sparse references and added stricter type-hint resolvability regression that passes without csr_matrix globals.

title: Fix test contamination from sys.modules purge in test_imports
description: test_module_import_order_robustness deletes all fmrimod* modules from sys.modules and does not restore them. This creates stale class identity splits (e.g., Term) in later tests under shuffled execution order. Add regression + restore state to keep import-order test isolated.
close_reason: Test contamination was addressed by running import-order check in subprocess with no in-process module purge/restoration assumptions.

title: Preserve EventMatrix column_names when subsetting event terms
description: Order-sensitive failure shows _subset_event_term recreates EventMatrix without passing original column_names, causing names like motion_1/motion_2 instead of explicit labels (roll/pitch). Fix subsetting path to preserve column metadata and keep test stable under shuffled execution.
close_reason: Fixed via EventModel._subset_event_term column_names propagation and regression test

title: Fix cached_hrf_eval callable detection for protocol HRFs
description: cached_hrf_eval currently checks callable(getattr(hrf, '__call__', None)); objects with dynamic __getattr__ can appear callable for __call__ without being callable instances, leading to TypeError when invoked. Use callable(hrf) and fall back to evaluate(). Add regression test.
close_reason: Fixed callable detection in cached_hrf_eval (use callable(hrf)) and added regression test for non-callable protocol HRFs with synthetic __call__ attributes.

title: Validate cached_hrf_eval dt/span inputs with clear errors
description: cached_hrf_eval currently throws cryptic runtime errors for dt<=0 (ZeroDivisionError or NumPy reduction errors). Add explicit validation for finite positive dt (and finite non-negative span) and raise clear ValueError messages. Add regression tests.
close_reason: Added explicit cached_hrf_eval validation for dt/span and regression tests; now raises clear ValueError for invalid inputs.

title: Validate condition_basis_list output argument
description: condition_basis_list currently treats any output value other than 'matrix' as 'condition_list', silently masking invalid caller input. Enforce explicit allowed values ('condition_list' | 'matrix') and raise ValueError otherwise. Add regression test.
close_reason: Added explicit output validation in condition_basis_list and regression test for invalid output mode.

title: Make cached_hrf_eval robust to list-like evaluate outputs
description: cached_hrf_eval assumes evaluate/call returns ndarray and accesses .ndim directly. Protocol-compliant wrappers may return Python lists, causing AttributeError. Coerce outputs with np.asarray before shape normalization and add regression test.
close_reason: Coerced cached_hrf_eval outputs to ndarray and added regression for list-valued evaluate output.

title: Broadcast scalar cached_hrf_eval outputs to (n_time,1)
description: cached_hrf_eval currently returns 0D scalar when evaluate/call returns a scalar constant, violating expected matrix shape (n_timepoints, nbasis). Broadcast scalar outputs across evaluation grid and add regression test.
close_reason: Broadcast scalar outputs in cached_hrf_eval to (n_time,1) and added regression test.

title: Normalize row-vector HRF outputs in cached_hrf_eval
description: cached_hrf_eval currently accepts 2D outputs with shape (1, n_times) as-is, misinterpreting dimensions as 1 timepoint and n_times basis functions. Detect row-vector outputs and transpose to (n_times, 1); validate first dimension aligns with evaluation grid.
close_reason: Normalized row-vector outputs in cached_hrf_eval and added regression test for shape orientation.

title: Validate non-empty sampling_frame in convolve fallback paths
description: convolve(..., sampling_frame=np.array([])) currently crashes with IndexError in fallback paths (uses grid[-1]). Add explicit sampling grid validation and raise clear ValueError before convolution. Add regression tests.
close_reason: Already implemented: sampling_frame emptiness validation present with regression tests

title: Normalize sampling_frame to 1D in convolve paths
description: convolve accepts array-like sampling_frame but currently leaves shape untouched. Row-vector input shape (1,n) crashes in fallback path with TypeError; column-vector shape (n,1) works accidentally. Normalize sampling grids to 1D and validate non-empty. Add regression test.
close_reason: Normalized convolve sampling_frame inputs to 1D grids and added row-vector regression test.

title: Make fallback convolution respect sampling_frame spacing
description: When sampling_frame is provided with array/callable HRFs, fallback convolution currently uses sampling_rate kwarg (default 1.0) and grid[-1] only, yielding wrong output length/timing (e.g., grid len 10 -> output len 19 for TR=2). Derive effective sampling_rate and duration from sampling_frame and shift onsets by grid origin. Add regression test.
close_reason: Guarded fallback sampling_frame behavior with regression tests (grid-length preservation); verified current helper-based fallback path is stable.

title: Validate finite sampling_frame values in convolve
description: convolve currently lets NaN/inf sampling_frame values propagate into low-level integer conversion errors (ValueError/OverflowError). Add explicit finite-value check in sampling grid preparation and raise clear ValueError. Add regression tests.
close_reason: Added explicit finite-value validation for sampling_frame in convolve and regression tests for NaN/inf grids.

title: Make public type hints resolvable without custom namespace
description: Several public callables fail typing.get_type_hints due to missing globals (HRF, Regressor, EventFactor, EventVariable, EventMatrix, Term). Import/qualify these names so default get_type_hints works, and add regression tests.
close_reason: Made public type hints resolvable without custom namespace; added regression and validated

title: Fix contrast_weights ast type-hint resolution NameError
description: Full suite regression: tests/design/test_contrast_weights_coverage.py::test_ast_annotated_helpers_type_hints_resolve fails because ast is not imported at module scope in fmrimod/contrast/contrast_weights.py. Add module-level ast import so typing.get_type_hints resolves.
close_reason: Duplicate of ast type-hint fix already completed

title: Stabilize test_plot_contrasts isolated backend
description: Per-file pytest audit found tests/design/test_plot_contrasts.py aborts in isolated runs by invoking matplotlib macOS backend. Force non-interactive Agg backend in module and add regression check.
close_reason: Already fixed: test module forces Agg backend and includes regression check

title: Add regression test for pytest rpy2 marker registration
description: There are many @pytest.mark.rpy2 tests but pytest.ini does not declare the marker. Add a test that asserts registration and declare the marker in pytest.ini so unknown-mark warnings are eliminated.
close_reason: Already implemented and validated: pytest.ini declares rpy2 marker and tests/test_pytest_config.py passes

title: Fix rpy2 parity failures from SamplingFrame TR keyword mismatch
description: Running tests/design/test_rpy2_parity.py now fails with TypeError: SamplingFrame.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'TR'. Likely API mismatch between local fmrihrf and test assumptions.
close_reason: Resolved by TR/tr compatibility updates in tests/design/test_rpy2_parity.py and fmrimod/design/event_model.py

title: Fix parser TYPE_CHECKING indentation regression
description: Parser.parse_formula currently has `if TYPE_CHECKING:` with no body, causing an IndentationError during import. Restore type-checking import block so module import succeeds.
close_reason: Fixes parser indentation regression; parse_formula imports now valid and import-based tests pass

title: Preserve EventMatrix column_names in EventModel block subsetting
description: EventModel._subset_event_term reconstructs EventMatrix without passing column_names, so explicit names are lost during block-wise subsetting. Add regression test and preserve names.
close_reason: Preserved EventMatrix column_names during block subsetting and added regression test
